name: ActionFlow Meeting Tracker - Make Scenario Blueprint
description: Blueprint for a Make scenario that receives meeting notes, extracts structured follow-up work, logs results, and returns JSON to the hosted dashboard.

modules.name: Custom Webhook
modules.purpose: Receive meeting title, transcript, and source metadata from the ActionFlow dashboard.

modules.name: Structured Extraction
modules.purpose: Extract actions, owners, due dates, decisions, risks, blockers, priority, and status.

modules.name: Follow-up Summary
modules.purpose: Generate a concise operational summary for the meeting.

modules.name: Meeting History Log
modules.purpose: Store counts, JSON output, summary, and transcript for tracking.

modules.name: Task Creation
modules.purpose: Create tasks in a connected work management app when action items are found.

modules.name: Return Dashboard JSON
modules.purpose: Send the structured result back to the hosted dashboard.
